2139070.name: Fantasy Grounds - Devin Night Token Pack 159: Sinister Snakes
2139070.description:
Devin Night Token Pack 159: Sinister Snakes

From the treacherous southern jungles a collection of sinister serpents is invading! This nest of nefarious nagas feature 27 tokens of various genders and shapes. From the infamous half snake half person, to sneaky humanoid forms with coiled cobra like appendages and full serpentine soldiers, with a mixture of ranged and close quarter weapons!
Hatch this venomous pit of scaled scheming snakes into the depths of your campaign today and remind your heroes why these cold blooded foes make theirs run hot!
